request.prompt: We already decided Trophy admin IA should move Clipart under Customization, and Brand Assets should keep only Colors and Fonts. Please give concise feedback on the next design decision: should Clipart Category be a global taxonomy under Customization, or should categories be implicit/free-form metadata on each clipart asset? Inspect current Trophy code/domain language if useful. Return: 1) recommendation, 2) 2-3 reasons, 3) one concrete edge case that the choice resolves.
request.title: Review next clipart domain decision
